entities.name: RED SOILS
entities.description: Red colored soils found in benchmark spots in the semi-arid tropics of India

entities.name: BLACK SOILS
entities.description: Black colored soils found in benchmark spots in the semi-arid tropics of India

entities.name: SOIL DEPTH
entities.description: The vertical extent of the soil profile

entities.name: SOIL COLOR
entities.description: The visual appearance of the soil, often indicating organic carbon content

entities.name: SOIL TEXTURE
entities.description: The relative proportion of sand, silt, and clay in the soil

entities.name: SOIL CONSISTENCE
entities.description: The resistance of soil to deformation, including wet and moist states

entities.name: SOIL STRUCTURE
entities.description: The arrangement of soil particles into aggregates

entities.name: ROOTS
entities.description: The presence and distribution of plant roots within the soil profile

entities.name: COARSE FRAGMENTS
entities.description: Large particles or rock fragments present in the soil

entities.name: NODULES
entities.description: Small lumps of mineral matter in the soil

entities.name: EFFERVESCENCE
entities.description: The reaction of soil with acid indicating the presence of carbonates

entities.name: SLICKENSIDES
entities.description: Polished surfaces in clay-rich soils caused by swelling and shrinking

entities.name: CRACKS
entities.description: Fissures in the soil surface or profile

entities.name: CLAY CUTANS
entities.description: Clay coatings on soil particles or surfaces

entities.name: SUBHUMID ECOSYSTEM
entities.description: An ecosystem characterized by moist and dry periods

entities.name: SEMI-ARID ECOSYSTEM
entities.description: An ecosystem characterized by moist and dry periods with lower rainfall than subhumid

entities.name: ARID ECOSYSTEM
entities.description: An ecosystem characterized by very low rainfall

entities.name: HIGH MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Intensive agricultural management practices

entities.name: SOIL ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: The amount of carbon stored in the soil's organic matter

entities.name: SODICITY
entities.description: The presence of excessive sodium in the soil causing structural problems

entities.name: ZEOLITES
entities.description: Soil modifiers used to mitigate sodicity

entities.name: GYPSUM
entities.description: Soil modifiers used to mitigate sodicity

entities.name: ROOT DENSITY
entities.description: The amount of roots per unit volume of soil

entities.name: CALCIUM CARBONATE CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of CaCO3 present in the soil

entities.name: DILUTE HCL
entities.description: Chemical used in the field to test for soil effervescence

entities.name: CALCIUM CONCRETIONS
entities.description: Hard masses of calcium carbonate observed in the field

entities.name: MEAN ANNUAL RAINFALL
entities.description: The average yearly precipitation of a region

entities.name: IRRIGATION
entities.description: The artificial application of water to soil

entities.name: SODIC HAPLUSTERTS
entities.description: A specific classification of sodic soils

entities.name: INORGANIC CARBON SEQUESTRATION
entities.description: The process of storing carbon in inorganic forms in the soil

entities.name: CHEMICAL DEGRADATION
entities.description: The loss of soil quality due to natural or human-induced chemical changes

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the benchmark spots are located

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The climatic region where the study was conducted
